data.title: Add convert-to-epic path to brainstorm SKILL.md
data.description:
Modify plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md to add:

1. A new "## Convert-to-Epic Path" section that defines the full convert flow:
   - Note original ticket ID and content
   - Proceed to Phase 1 with original content as seeding context (full brainstorm flow creates new epic)
   - ONLY AFTER the new epic is successfully created: close the original ticket
   - Use ticket edit on new epic to reference original ticket ID for traceability
   - Bug tickets: use --reason="Escalated to user: superseded by epic <new-epic-id>"
   - Tickets with open children: re-parent children to new epic or close them before closing original
2. Replace the Type Detection Gate's inline Option (a) steps (lines 70-73) with a delegation reference to the new section. Remove the inline 'ticket transition ... closed' command from the gate — the gate should say "Proceed to Convert-to-Epic Path below" instead
3. Remove RED marker from .test-index

CRITICAL: The existing inline Option (a) at lines 70-73 closes the ticket BEFORE creating the epic. This must be replaced with a delegation to the new section which closes AFTER.

## File Impact
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- MODIFY: .test-index

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All 5 tests pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-brainstorm-convert-to-epic.sh; test $? -eq 0
- [ ] SKILL.md contains convert-to-epic section
  Verify: grep -qi 'convert.*epic.*path\|convert-to-epic path' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] Close step appears after epic creation step (order of operations)
  Verify: grep -qi 'after.*epic.*created\|only after.*new epic\|after.*successfully' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] Section references original ticket for traceability
  Verify: grep -qi 'original.*ticket.*id\|traceability\|reference.*original' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] Section handles bug --reason
  Verify: grep -qi 'reason.*superseded\|Escalated to user.*superseded' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] Gate delegates to section (no inline close command)
  Verify: python3 -c "
import re
with open('plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md') as f: c=f.read()
gate=c[c.index('Type Detection Gate'):c.index('Phase 1:')]
opt_a=gate[gate.index('Option (a)'):gate.index('Option (b)')]
assert 'ticket transition' not in opt_a, 'Gate still has inline close'
print('PASS')
"
- [ ] RED marker removed
  Verify: { grep -q '\[test_convert_section_exists\]' .test-index; test $? -ne 0; }
- [ ] Test entry still exists
  Verify: grep -q 'test-brainstorm-convert-to-epic.sh' .test-index
